street.description: Street the restricted traffic approaches on, name only — leg/drive qualifiers like 'eastern leg' go in location_detail, but named carriageways ('Commonwealth Avenue, North Drive') stay whole

direction.description: Direction of travel the prohibition applies to; empty when the source states none

cross_street.description: Street being crossed or at which the prohibition applies ('crossing X', 'at X'); empty when the source states none

onto_street.description: Street the prohibited through movement would continue onto ('onto X', 'continuing onto X'); often the same name as street — keep it anyway, that repetition is the through movement; empty when the source states none

location_detail.description: Leg or positional qualifier from the source (e.g. 'eastern leg')

exception.description: Exempted traffic, lowercase, without parentheses or the word 'except' (e.g. 'bicycles'); empty when no exemption

days.description: Days of the first (or only) schedule; empty (with times empty) means at all times

times.description: Time window(s) of the first (or only) schedule; empty means at all times

days_2.description: Days of a second schedule when the source states a distinct day set with its own times; empty otherwise

times_2.description: Time window(s) paired with days_2; empty when there is no second schedule

notes.description: Extractor remarks about anomalies in the source text; never carries data
